title: linaria linifolia
intro: Linaria linifolia, also known as needle flax or thread-leaved toadflax, is a perennial herb belonging to the figwort family (Scrophulariaceae). It is traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to provide health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in the treatment of skin conditions like eczema. Herbal preparations of Linaria linifolia include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, often used to make topical creams and ointments for skin issues.
